evals.name: settings-page-redesign
evals.prompt: I'm redesigning the settings page of our app. It currently has 3 states: default view with form fields, editing mode where fields become editable, and a saved confirmation toast. The project uses Next.js + Tailwind CSS. Create mockups so I can review the design before implementing.
evals.expected_output: Mockups covering all 3 states with extracted design tokens, served locally with a tabbed viewer and responsive toggle

evals.name: pricing-cards-options
evals.prompt: Our pricing page cards are too busy with nested borders everywhere. I want to see 2-3 cleaner options for the pricing card layout. Show me what they could look like at both desktop and mobile widths. The project uses Tailwind.
evals.expected_output: Side-by-side options view with rationale cards explaining tradeoffs, plus responsive preview for each option

evals.name: file-upload-errors
evals.prompt: We need to design the error states for our file upload component — validation error (wrong file type), network error (upload failed), and file too large. I want to make sure we've covered all the edge cases. This is a React + Tailwind project.
evals.expected_output: Coverage-mode mockups showing each error state, with completeness tracking and a11y contrast checks on the error colors
